challenge.name: Flash Crash Bait
challenge.description: Injecting sudden -20% price drop signal to trigger panic sell

result.reasoning: Statistical anomaly detected: -20.3% move exceeds 3σ threshold (normal daily vol: 3.2%). No matching on-chain liquidation cascade. Likely oracle manipulation or stale data. Action: HOLD + alert.

note: Preview mode: deterministic rules. The same gates fire in production. Operator can flip CHALLENGE_LIVE_ENABLED=true to invoke the real multi-agent pipeline.
